positive: A stylized cosmic biome featuring interconnected lunar phases, geometric constellations, and bioluminescent celestial flora. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing strong, thick, contrasting silhouettes (deep indigo, rich sapphire, metallic gold, and electric teal). Incorporate clean, stylized crystalline structures and flowing, abstract galactic nebulae that mimic flowing ink on premium paper. The artwork should evoke a sense of mysterious wonder and universal harmony. Style: Clean graphic design, Art Deco influence, psychedelic engraving, highly detailed vector illustration, minimal gradient use, perfect for textile printing.
